finding_results.notes: Replaced repeated one-word acknowledgments with leverage-bearing replies: Ravi now concedes harm, names fallback actions (Priya/Tess), and accepts enforceable conditions.
Rewrote confrontation phrasing toward concrete, in-scene diction and removed mechanical reuse of explicit meta-keywords.

summary: Addressed both dialogue-pass findings by increasing leverage cadence in the core confrontation and replacing abstract procedural keyword signaling with character-true concrete language while preserving continuity and chapter contract.
